name: Jiangxi Ganyue Expressway CO.,LTD.
summary: Jiangxi Ganyue Expressway CO.,LTD., together with its subsidiaries, operates and manages expressways in China. It manages 800 kilometers of expressways connecting Changjiu, Changyi, Changtai, Jiujing, Wenhou, Penghu, Changfeng, and Fenghuang. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Nanchang, China. Jiangxi Ganyue Expressway CO.,LTD. is a subsidiary of Jiangxi Provincial Expressway Investment Group Co., Ltd.
